notes: Pilot LOO on tiny subsets (50/500 train) with short training (15-30 epochs). All LOO-TDA correlations near zero. Root causes: (1) Models trained on 50-500 samples achieve only 30-50% accuracy, producing extremely noisy loss landscapes where LOO influence signals are dominated by noise. (2) 15-30 epochs insufficient for convergence on even small subsets. (3) Gradient-dot-product approximate IF with identity Hessian is too crude. (4) Phase 1 TRAK/EKFAC comparison failed due to index mismatch. FOR FULL EXPERIMENT: Must use the properly-trained 200-epoch model (95.5% acc) with full 5K training subset. Use dattri/pyDVL for proper IF computation rather than crude gradient dots. Expect ~30 GPU-hours for 100 test points x 5000 LOO retrainings.
recommendation_for_full: Use full 5K training subset with the 200-epoch checkpoint (95.5% acc). Proper IF computation via dattri EK-FAC. Budget 30 GPU-hours.
